Describe what is happening.
canonical_answer: A woman with long blonde hair and black-rimmed glasses presents on the left side of a split screen layout. She wears a light pink sleeveless top and a gold fringe necklace around her neck. An inset image on the right shows a couple and a small fluffy grey and white cat. A blue banner at the bottom displays the text 'ZAYN & PERRIE MARRIED?!'.

question: Describe the sequence of distinct scenes and subjects shown from the beginning until the news presenter appears.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a 3D logo with teal stripes is displayed; at 2s, a man in a black leather jacket stands indoors; at 4s, a group including a blonde woman walks on a city sidewalk; at 10s, men in suits stand on a red carpet backdrop; at 16s, a woman in a pink top appears beside a photograph.

question: Describe the visible actions and background details during the outdoor walking sequences and the red carpet event.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a group walks past a city background; at 6s, a double-decker bus is visible behind the pedestrians; at 10s, the scene cuts to men on a red carpet; at 12s, five women walk together past a storefront; at 16s, a woman in glasses presents news next to an inset image.
